title: Broiled Clam Masala
description: A flavorful Indian-inspired dish featuring clams cooked to perfection under the broiler, served with a side of aromatic masala spices.

ingredients.name: norval
ingredients.amount: 1 tsp garam masala, 1 tsp ground cumin, 1 tsp smoked paprika

instructions: Rinse the clams under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the garam masala, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and chili flakes (if using).
Brush the clams with vegetable oil and sprinkle with the spice mixture.
Place the clams on a baking sheet lined with aluminum foil and broil for 5-7 minutes, or until they open.
Meanwhile, heat the ghee or oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the clams hot, garnished with chopped cilantro and a drizzle of the lemon-ginger sauce.
Serve with basmati rice or naan bread for a complete meal.
